name: template

scripts.build: bun run gen && turbo run build
scripts.dev: bun run gen && turbo run dev
scripts.check-types: bun run gen && turbo run check-types
scripts.db:generate: bun run gen && cd packages/database && bun run db:generate
scripts.db:push: bun run gen && cd packages/database && bun run db:push

_comment_overrides: Force a single Elysia copy across the workspace. Two copies silently break Elysia macros (the authorized/authenticated auth guards), bypassing RBAC. Keep aligned with packages/api.
